---
title: "Dolphin Social Network Analysis"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Dolphin Social Network Analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

## The Dolphin Dataset

The dolphin social network consists of 62 bottlenose dolphins from Doubtful
Sound, New Zealand. Edges represent frequent associations between individuals.

```{r}
library(mfmsbm)
data(dolphin)

A <- dolphin$A
Z0 <- dolphin$Z0
n <- nrow(A)
```

## MFM-SBM with Poisson Prior

```{r}
M <- 20000
BI <- 10000
a <- b <- gamma_ <- 1
lambda <- 1
K_start <- 9

logVn <- log_vn_miller(gamma_, n, n + 10, lambda)
z_start <- c(sample(1:K_start, K_start), sample(1:K_start, n - K_start, replace = TRUE))
fit_po <- cogibbs_poisson(M, K_start, A, n, a, b, gamma_, logVn, z_start)

cc_po <- coclustering_matrix(fit_po$z_post[, (BI + 1):M])
```

## MFM-SBM with Gnedin Prior

```{r}
fit_gn <- cogibbs_gnedin(M, K_start, A, n, a, b, gamma_, gamma_gn = 0.1, z_start)

cc_gn <- coclustering_matrix(fit_gn$z_post[, (BI + 1):M])
```

## Point Estimation and Comparison

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("mcclust.ext", quietly = TRUE) &&
    requireNamespace("fossil", quietly = TRUE)) {
  memb_po <- mcclust.ext::minVI(cc_po, method = "avg", max.k = 20)$cl
  memb_gn <- mcclust.ext::minVI(cc_gn, method = "avg", max.k = 20)$cl

  cat("Poisson - K_hat:", length(unique(memb_po)),
      "RI:", fossil::compare(memb_po, Z0, method = "rand"), "\n")
  cat("Gnedin  - K_hat:", length(unique(memb_gn)),
      "RI:", fossil::compare(memb_gn, Z0, method = "rand"), "\n")
}
```
